promptOutput.title: Result
promptOutput.placeholder:
Build your flowchart
then assemble to generate the prompt.
promptOutput.shareText: Check out flompt! Turn any AI prompt into a visual flow. Free & open-source.
promptOutput.injectLabel: Send prompt to AI chat input

errors.overloaded: AI is overloaded right now. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. The AI took too long to respond. Try again.
errors.network: Connection lost. Check your internet and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again in a few seconds.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sidebar.title: Blocks
sidebar.hint: Click to add · Drag to canvas

canvas.emptyHint: Paste a prompt on the left and click
canvas.emptyDecompose: Decompose, or drag a block from the sidebar.

tour.step1desc: Type or paste any text here. Vague or detailed, it doesn't matter. flompt will structure it for you.
tour.stepBlocksDesc: Each block type targets one part of your prompt: Role, Objective, Constraints, Output Format… Click to add one, or drag it onto the canvas.
tour.step2desc: flompt sends your prompt to the AI, which breaks it into typed blocks: Role, Objective, Constraints and more.
tour.step3desc: Each block is one aspect of your prompt. Edit the content, reorder by dragging, and add blocks from the left sidebar.
tour.step4desc: Hit Compile to generate your final prompt: structured, optimized, and ready to paste into any LLM.
tour.samplePrompt: You are a senior Python developer. Review the following code for bugs, performance issues, and style violations. Be concise, prioritize critical issues, and explain each finding in one sentence. Respond with a numbered list.

extension.bannerText: flompt is now available on Chrome & Firefox. Use it inside ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini.
extension.popupTitle: flompt is now on Chrome & Firefox!
extension.popupDesc: Use flompt directly inside ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini. Available on Chrome and Firefox. No tab switching needed.

starPopup.title: Enjoying flompt?
starPopup.desc: flompt is free & open-source. If it's useful to you, a ⭐ on GitHub helps us grow and keeps it alive.
